Tell me about product PROD-001

The ProBook Laptop 15 (PROD-001) is a high-performance laptop in the Electronics category. It features an Intel Core i7-12700H processor, 16GB DDR5 RAM, and a 512GB NVMe SSD. It is priced at $999.99 and comes with a 2-year warranty.

It has an average rating of 4.5 stars from 234 reviews. Recent reviews highlight "Excellent performance!" and "Great for coding."

There are 45 units in stock, with 10 in the EU, 15 in US-East, and 20 in US-West.
Details for PROD-002

The Wireless Headphones Pro (PROD-002) are premium noise-canceling wireless headphones. They feature 40mm drivers, 30 hours of battery life, and active noise canceling. They are priced at $199.99 and have a rating of 4.7 stars from 512 reviews. Customers praise their excellent noise canceling and suitability for travel.

There are 120 units in stock, with 30 in the EU warehouse, 40 in US-East, and 50 in US-West. They come with a 1-year warranty.
